=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
2003.02.11 Brisbane, Australia, Brisbane Entertainment Centre

unknown rec, very good sound

CD1

01 Maggie's Farm, 02 I'll Be Your Baby Tonight, 03 Highway 61 Revisited, 04 You Ain't Goin' Nowhere, 05 Things Have Changed, 06 The Wicked Messenger, 07 It's All Over Now, Baby Blue, 08 Masters Of War, 09 Forever Young, 10 Don't Think Twice, It's All Right,

CD2

01 Watching The River Flow, 02 Honest With Me, 03 Saving Grace, 04 High Water, 05 Moonlight, 06 Summer Days, 07 Crowd, 08 It Ain't Me, Babe, 09 All Along The Watchtower 



Concert # 1493 of The Never-Ending Tour. Third concert of the 2003 Tour Down Under. Third 2003 concert.
Third concert with the 15th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), Bill Burnette (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), George Recile (drums & percussion).

7-10, 17 acoustic with the band.
1-6, 11-16 Bob Dylan (piano).
2, 6, 11, 17  Bob Dylan (harmonica).
2, 7, 13 Larry Campbell (pedal steel guitar).
10, 17 Larry Campbell (cittern).
11, 12 Larry Campbell (slide guitar
